description_long: This is a single bed with a robust, dark wooden frame featuring thick posts at each corner and a slightly arched headboard and footboard. The bed is dressed with a green comforter adorned with a repeating white fleur-de-lis pattern, and a matching pillow rests at the head. The mattress is visible beneath the bedding, appearing white and well-fitted within the frame. The wood has a polished, smooth finish, giving the bed a classic and sturdy appearance. The overall design is traditional, with the prominent posts and solid construction suggesting durability. The bed would be suitable for placement in a residential or hospitality setting within an urban environment.
description: A sturdy, dark wood single bed with thick posts, an arched headboard and footboard, and green fleur-de-lis patterned bedding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the green patterned comforter, and the pillow at the head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched headboard, pillow, and the symmetry of the posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bed's length, the comforter, and the pillow positioned at the head.
description_view_3: Foot view showing the arched footboard and the posts, with the bedding and pillow visible at the far end.
